block.next_step: Investigate the enemy-phase prediction miss before solving or advancing another final-island turn.
block.resolve_reason: Diagnosed and fixed in simulator v278: Force Swap can leave a standard melee Vek with stale queued_origin but live queued_target adjacent to its current tile; Bouncer1 at E5 still attacked E6, pushed ExchangeMech into the E7 building, and killed it. Fix committed c84e7d30 and installed; continuing live salvage because grid/objective survived.
